releaseNotes: Every song list (Home, Albums, Artists, Library, Favorites, Playlists, Search) now has a matching ⋮ menu: Play Next, Add to Queue, Add to Playlist, Delete Song
Long-press any song to add it straight to a playlist, or create a new one on the spot
Library now has a Refresh button to pick up newly added or removed songs without restarting the app
Library tabs reordered to Albums, Songs, Artists (Songs still opens by default)
